para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: USP-1325 / Q.No.102 / PRASH-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: USP 1325 / Q.No.102 / PROSH-1, D. 13.03.2026
By order under reference, Mr.Samandhan Vasantrao Khatkale, Deputy Secretary, Cidco Corporation
After his return from the post of deputation, the service of this deputation shall be terminated.
The post was posted as Deputy Secretary, Department of Higher and Technical Education.
2. Now, by this order, the deputation of Mr. Samandhan Vasantrao Khatkale, Deputy Secretary,
Post-retirement, the position has been partially changed for administrative reasons.
He is being given a revised posting in the Other Backward Classes Bahujan Welfare Department.
3. Mr. Khatkale, Deputy Secretary should immediately join the Other Backward Bahujan Welfare Department.
This Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
